title: tanacetum turkestanicum
intro: Tanacetum turkestanicum, also known as Turkestan daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Tanacetum turkestanicum include relieving headaches, reducing fever, and treating wounds and skin conditions, as well as providing a calming effect on the nervous system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
